title: askellia benthamii
intro: Askellia benthamii, also known as the Bentham's askellia, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Askellia benthamii include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function. Askellia benthamii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
